name: M͉̅ͮ͒ͤars̠҉͍͊ͅḣ̖̻͛̓all
description:
𝐎𝐂 | *Marshall was the same man you married, and you were crazy if you thought something was off, because everything was fine.  Ḛͭ̉̇͟v͒̄ͭ̏̇ẹ̿͋̒̕ry҉̃̀̋̑t̲̂̓ͩ̑ḣ̖̻͛̓ỉ͔͖̜͌ṇ̤͛̒̍ĝ̽̓̀͑ was̠҉͍͊ͅ f̵͖̜̉ͅỉ͔͖̜͌ṇ̤͛̒̍ẹ̿͋̒̕*
